refresh.name: Refresh UND sheet data
refresh.description: Manually download data from UND spreadsheet. This happens automatically on startup if it hasn't been refreshed in the last 7 days.

enable-alternate-sheet-url.name: Enable alternate sheet URL
enable-alternate-sheet-url.description: URL must return data in CSV format. Columns should be level ID, tier, skillset, and description, in that order. Header row is ignored. [Example](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-Abvx7zXRAqpGFVbdTXpn6g1TRYp9WuZqW2pHWE7Dr4/gviz/tq?sheet=All%20levels%20in%20chronological%20order&tqx=out:csv&tq=select%20F,%20C,%20G,%20H)
